Update: An EF-1 tornado touched down at the Raleigh Executive Jetport. Several hangers had damage to wall panels and doors. Several aircraft were damaged. Minor damage to the taxiway occurred. The tornado briefly lifted before touching back down near its end point, and resulted in minor damage to several mobile homes and several trees that were snapped and uprooted.
KTTA sustained damage to a couple of hangars and aircrafts; and runway and taxiways were closed to remove debris. KRAX confirmed TDS.

Update: An EF-1 tornado touched down at the Raleigh Executive Jetport. Several hangers had damage to wall panels and doors. Several aircraft were damaged. Minor damage to the taxiway occurred. The tornado briefly lifted before touching back down near its end point, and resulted in minor damage to several mobile homes and several trees that were snapped and uprooted.
Update: An EF-1 tornado touched down along Moncure Pittsboro Rd and snapped and uprooted several trees, before continuing to the NW for approximately 1.4 miles.
Update: An EF-1 tornado touched down along Moncure Pittsboro Rd and snapped and uprooted several trees, before continuing to the NW for approximately 1.4 miles.

Aberdeen Creek flooded parts of NC-5 and US-1 with several roads closed in the area.

A tornado touched down along Mount Hermon Rock Creek Rd in Southwest Alamance County, just north of Russell McPherson Rd. It then tracked south a short distance before lifting near the intersection of Mount Hermon Rock Creek Rd and Mountain Valley Drive. Numerous trees were snapped and uprooted, with the worst of the damage occurring to an automotive repair shop, whose entire roof was torn off by the tornado.
*** 1 FATAL *** Two boaters launched a canoe from Marthas Chapel Road around 5pm on Sunday, one boater was found Tuesday morning.

*** 2 FATAL *** Corrects previous flash flood report from 4 ESE Fearrington. Two boaters launched a canoe from Marthas Chapel Road around 5pm on Sunday, one body was found Tuesday morning, the other Wednesday morning. Exact time has been estimated.

Update: An EF-1 tornado touched down on the northern end of Royal Oak Ln, just north of Lake Michael and slowly drifted to the southeast about a quarter mile before lifting. During this brief time on the ground, considerable tree damage was done, with dozens of trees snapped and uprooted.

Update: An EF-1 tornado touched down on the northern end of Royal Oak Ln, just north of Lake Michael and slowly drifted to the southeast about a quarter mile before lifting. During this brief time on the ground, considerable tree damage was done, with dozens of trees snapped and uprooted.
